Title: Mission Objective
Definition: The mission shall acquire scientific data to characterize the target environment.
Verification: Verify via mission success criteria review.

Title: Science Data Collection
Definition: The mission shall collect quantitative measurements of defined physical parameters.

Title: Mission Lifetime
Definition: The mission shall operate for a minimum duration of 12 months.

Title: Data Return
Definition: The mission shall transmit collected science data to the ground segment.

Title: Coverage
Definition: The mission shall achieve required spatial and/or temporal coverage of the target.

Title: Measurement Accuracy
Definition: The mission shall achieve measurement accuracy sufficient to meet scientific objectives.
